metadata.title: PromptModelManifest — immutable AI invocation configuration snapshot

description: Immutable snapshot of a PromptModel artifact's model.yaml configuration (src/shared/models/prompt_model.py). Frozen dataclass — fields cannot be mutated after construction. Populated exclusively by PromptModel.load() via from_yaml() classmethod; never constructed directly by callers. This is the sole governed surface for AI invocations — a rule exists (ai.prompt.model_required) that requires PromptModelManifest presence; the contract makes its required field set constitutionally visible and enforceable. The output_must_contain list is the critical field: if empty, ai.prompt.model_required validation is vacuous (passes but enforces nothing). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.

role.description: Cognitive role this manifest governs. Governed vocabulary: cognitive role registry.

model_max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for the LLM call. Sourced from model.yaml or operational config defaults.

output_max_length.description: Maximum character length of the expected output.

output_must_contain.description: List of strings the LLM output must contain for validation to pass. An empty list makes ai.prompt.model_required validation vacuous — this is the critical drift risk.

output_must_not_contain.description: List of strings the LLM output must not contain.

success_criteria.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes a successful LLM response for this manifest.
